onboarding.title: Let's get to know you
onboarding.subtitle: A few questions to personalise your experience

age_range.title: How old are you?
age_range.subtitle: This helps us understand your stage of life alongside fibromyalgia

diagnosis_years.title: How long have you had fibromyalgia?
diagnosis_years.subtitle: This helps us understand where you are in your journey

severity.title: How would you describe your current fibromyalgia?
severity.subtitle: Be honest. There's no right answer.
severity.severe: Severe, significantly limits what I can do

medications.title: Are you currently on any treatment?
medications.subtitle: Select everything that applies

pain_locations.title: Where do you most often feel pain?
pain_locations.subtitle: Select all that apply

pain_types.title: What kinds of pain do you experience?
pain_types.subtitle: Select all that apply

conditions.title: Do you have any related conditions?
conditions.subtitle: These often travel with fibromyalgia. Select any that apply.
conditions.info_message: Many people with fibromyalgia have related conditions. Tracking these alongside your symptoms helps us spot patterns. Poor sleep, for example, often triggers flares the following day. Logging them here lets Fibro flag these connections in your data.

morning_stiffness.title: Morning pain or stiffness
morning_stiffness.subtitle: How long do you typically feel stiff or painful when you first wake up?

challenges.title: What areas of life does fibromyalgia most impact for you?
challenges.subtitle: Select all that apply. This helps us focus the right support.

biological_sex.title: What is your biological sex?
biological_sex.subtitle: Fibromyalgia can present differently depending on your biology. This helps us tailor your tracking.
biological_sex.info_message: Fibromyalgia affects people differently based on biological sex. Research shows women tend to experience more widespread pain, fatigue, and cognitive symptoms, and that symptoms can shift with hormonal changes throughout the menstrual cycle. Selecting 'Female' unlocks optional period tracking in your daily log, so your AI insights can spot patterns like flares that cluster around specific cycle phases. You can always skip this or change it later in your profile.

notification_time.title: When would you like your daily check-in reminder?
notification_time.subtitle: We'll send you a gentle nudge at this time each evening

completing.title: Building your profile...
completing.subtitle: Fibro is getting to know you

ai_consent.title: AI-powered personalisation
ai_consent.subtitle: Fibro uses Claude AI (by Anthropic, Inc.) to generate your personalised insights and welcome message.
ai_consent.what_shared_title: What data is shared with Anthropic:
ai_consent.what_shared_2: Symptom logs (pain, fatigue, brain fog, mood, free-text notes)
ai_consent.what_shared_3: Health data (sleep, HRV, steps) if you have synced it
ai_consent.how_used_body: Your data is sent securely to generate insights. Anthropic does not use your data to train AI models. You can withdraw consent at any time from Settings.
ai_consent.decline_cta: No thanks, basic mode is fine

profile_ready.title: Your Fibro profile is ready
profile_ready.subtitle: Here's what we know about you so far
profile_ready.watch_title: What Fibro will watch for you

home.title: Good evening
home.no_nudges: No nudges yet. Keep tracking and your patterns will emerge.
home.no_data_yet: Keep tracking. Your trends will appear here.

home.fibro_score_days_needed_plural: Log {{count}} more days to see your score
home.check_in_card_subtitle: Take 60 seconds to log how you're feeling

tracker.title: Daily check-in
tracker.subtitle: How are you doing today?
tracker.medications_taken: Did you take your medication today?
tracker.already_logged_subtitle: You can edit below if needed.
tracker.activity_level_hint: How much did you do overall? Helps spot boom-bust patterns.
tracker.woke_rested_hint: Unrefreshed sleep is a key fibromyalgia marker.
tracker.high_sensitivity_day_hint: Heightened sensitivity to touch, sound, light, or temperature.
tracker.food_triggers_hint: Common dietary triggers for fibromyalgia, tracked for patterns

flares.title: Flare log
flares.subtitle: Track when flares start and end
flares.no_flares: No flares logged yet. Hopefully it stays that way!
flares.confirm_end: Are you sure you want to mark this flare as ended?

insights.title: Your insights
insights.no_data: Keep tracking to see your patterns emerge here
insights.unlock_ai_subtitle: See what's been affecting your symptoms each week
insights.ai_insight_teaser: Track for 2 weeks to unlock your first insight.
insights.ai_insight_error: Could not generate insight. Try again.
insights.trial_prompt_body: Get your first insight report free for 14 days.
insights.ai_off_body: To use insights and chat, turn on AI personalisation in your profile settings.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.ai_context_subtitle: Add anything useful for Fibro to know about you
profile.ai_context_placeholder: e.g. I work night shifts as a nurse. High stress period at work currently. I've been trying a low-inflammation diet.
profile.ai_context_helper: This gets included when Fibro generates your insights, so it can take your situation into account.
profile.purchase_unavailable: Purchases are not available right now. Please try again later.

health.connect_subtitle: Fibro uses your activity, sleep, and heart data to spot patterns before you feel them
health.permission_steps: Step count helps track your activity levels and spot when you're slowing down
health.permission_sleep: Sleep duration and quality are strongly linked to fibromyalgia flare risk
health.permission_hrv: HRV is one of the best early indicators of stress and nervous system strain
health.permission_heart_rate: Resting heart rate can signal when your body is under strain
health.permission_calories: Activity levels help us understand your energy output
health.permission_workouts: Knowing when you exercise helps contextualise pain and fatigue scores
health.not_available: Health data is not available on this device
health.permission_denied: Enable access in Settings > Privacy & Security > Health > Fibro
health.pressure_load_hint: Barometric pressure can trigger FM flares. Tap to load.
health.pressure_error_hint: Could not load. Check your connection and tap to retry.
health.pressure_info_message: Research shows that drops in barometric pressure can trigger or worsen fibromyalgia pain, stiffness, and fatigue. The exact reason isn't fully understood, but changes in pressure may affect tissue inflammation and how pain signals are processed. Many FM patients notice they can 'feel the weather changing' before it happens.

subscription.title: Fibro Premium
subscription.cancel_note: Cancel any time from Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions.
subscription.cancel_note_android: Cancel any time from Google Play → Subscriptions.
subscription.trial_prompt_subtitle: Unlock your personalised insight report, free for 14 days

premium_teaser.profile_body: Weekly reports, flare prediction, and a chat with your own data.
premium_teaser.profile_body_with_price: Weekly reports, flare prediction, and a chat with your own data. {{price}}/month after a 14-day free trial.
premium_teaser.insights_body: Weekly breakdown of your symptoms, flare prediction, and ask your data anything.

profile_privacy.ai_consent_toggle_subtitle: Share health data with Claude AI (Anthropic)
profile_privacy.ai_consent_alert_body: This allows Fibro to share your health data (symptom logs, profile, health metrics) with Claude AI (Anthropic, Inc.) to generate insights. Anthropic does not use your data to train AI models.
profile_privacy.ai_body_1: When you use AI Chat or weekly insights, your symptom logs, health data summaries, and profile information are sent to Anthropic (Claude API) to generate responses. Your raw health data is never sent, only aggregated summaries. Conversation history is stored locally on your device only.
profile_privacy.ai_body_2: Analytics events (e.g. features used) are sent to Firebase. Crash reports are sent to Sentry. Neither service receives your health or symptom data.
profile_privacy.sources_disclaimer: Fibro is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice. AI insights are pattern analysis based on your own logged data. Always consult your doctor or healthcare team before making any changes to your treatment.

export.title: Share with my doctor
export.subtitle: Generate a clean PDF summary of your last 3 months
export.includes: Includes: symptom scores, flare history, medication adherence, sleep and activity trends

nudges.sleep_disrupted: Your sleep has been disrupted recently. An early night might help.
nudges.low_activity: You've been less active than usual. Even gentle movement can help ease symptoms.
nudges.hrv_dip: Your body looks stressed today. Take it easy.
nudges.pain_rising: Pain has been creeping up this week. How's your sleep and stress been?
nudges.multiple_signals: A few signals are pointing the same way. Take it easy today.

ai_chat.title: Ask Fibro
ai_chat.greeting: Hi. I can see your tracking data. Ask me anything about your patterns, what might be triggering your symptoms, or anything about living with fibromyalgia.
ai_chat.locked_body: Upgrade to Fibro Premium to chat with your data.
ai_chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ai_chat.disclaimer: AI insights are based on your personal data and are not medical advice. Always consult your doctor or specialist.
ai_chat.consent_off_body: Enable AI personalisation in Profile to use this feature. Your data stays yours. We just need your permission first.

home_extra.pressure_track_body: Barometric pressure can trigger FM flares. Tap to load.
home_extra.score_log_more: Log {{count}} more days to see your score
home_extra.score_log_one_more: Log 1 more day to see your score
home_extra.flare_risk_warning_body: Several signals suggest a flare could be building. Rest up and check your medications.
home_extra.flare_risk_watch_body: A couple of signals worth watching. Keep an eye on how you feel over the next day or two.
home_extra.review_body: Your review helps more people with fibromyalgia find the app. It only takes a moment.

insights_extra.insight_weekly_teaser: Your personalised weekly insight will appear here once you have a few days of data.
insights_extra.insight_log_days: Log a few days and your insight will appear here.
insights_extra.trial_prompt_body: Your data is ready for its first AI analysis. See what patterns are driving your symptoms.
insights_extra.chat_card_subtitle: Ask about your patterns, trends, or symptoms
insights_extra.chart_fills_out: This chart fills out as you log more days.
insights_extra.patterns_clearer: Patterns become clearer as you log more days.
insights_extra.disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Not medical advice. Always consult your doctor or healthcare team about your symptoms and treatment.
insights_extra.fiq_about_message: The Fibromyalgia Impact Questionnaire measures how fibromyalgia affects your daily life across 10 dimensions. Scores range from 0-100; higher scores mean greater impact. Complete it monthly to track how things change over time.
insights_extra.fiq_prompt_body: 10 questions · ~3 minutes · tracks how fibromyalgia is affecting your daily life
insights_extra.fiq_clinical_note: The FIQ is a clinical tool for tracking fibromyalgia impact over time, not a diagnostic instrument.
insights_extra.fiq_error_save: Could not save your assessment. Please try again.

profile_extra.tap_to_fill: Tap to fill in the name, then set the dose and schedule below
profile_extra.no_treatment_yet: No treatment in your profile yet. Tap Edit treatment above to add yours.
profile_extra.delete_all_body: This permanently deletes all your logs, flares, medications, and profile data. It cannot be undone.
profile_extra.delete_confirm_body: All your data will be deleted and cannot be recovered.
profile_extra.feedback_subtitle: Bugs, ideas, or anything on your mind
profile_extra.apple_health_info_message:
Connecting Apple Health lets Fibro read data from your iPhone and Apple Watch, giving you a more complete picture of how your body is doing:

• Steps and active energy (how much you moved)
• Sleep duration (how rest affects your symptoms)
• Heart rate variability (a useful recovery indicator)
• Blood oxygen and respiratory rate (overnight recovery signals)
• Mindful minutes (meditation and breathing sessions)

All data stays on your device and in your private account. Nothing is shared with third parties.
profile_extra.delete_data_note: Permanently deletes all logs, flares, medications, and profile data.

flares_extra.delete_flare_body: This will permanently remove this entry.

premium_modal.header_subtitle: Understand your fibromyalgia like never before. Let your data tell the story.
premium_modal.feature_1_body: Every week, Fibro analyses your logs and surfaces the patterns driving your symptoms.
premium_modal.feature_2_body: Ask anything — "why do I flare on weekends?" or "what helps my sleep?" — and get answers grounded in your own history.
premium_modal.feature_3_body: When your patterns suggest a flare is building, Fibro lets you know early — so you can act before it peaks.
premium_modal.feature_4_body: The more context you give, the smarter your insights get. Premium unlocks full AI personalisation.
premium_modal.mock_insight_body: Your pain was lower on days you slept over 7 hours. Fatigue spiked mid-week — likely linked to Tuesday's longer walk.
premium_modal.mock_chat_user: Why do I tend to flare on weekends?
premium_modal.mock_chat_ai: Your data shows sleep is shorter on Friday nights, and you're 3× more active on Saturdays. Both are correlated with flares in your history.
premium_modal.mock_chat_prompt: Ask anything about your health data…
premium_modal.mock_flare_body: Stiffness has been trending up for 3 days. Based on your patterns, take it easy this weekend.

update_banner.title: Update available
update_banner.subtitle: Tap to get the latest version

onboarding_extra.welcome_subtitle: Fibro learns your patterns so you can stay ahead of flares and make the most of your good days.
onboarding_extra.welcome_feature_1: Track pain, fatigue, brain fog, and sleep in under 60 seconds
onboarding_extra.welcome_feature_2: Spot early warning signs before a flare strikes
onboarding_extra.welcome_feature_3: Share clear reports with your doctor
onboarding_extra.mock_warning_body: Pain has been trending up for 3 days and your sleep is shorter. Based on your patterns, take it easy today.
onboarding_extra.mock_creator_body: These signals predicted a flare 3 days before it struck. Fibro watches for exactly this.
onboarding_extra.mock_ai_user: Why was my pain lower this week?
onboarding_extra.mock_ai_response: You slept 7.5h on average — on those nights, your pain scores dropped by ~35%. Your medication adherence was also perfect this week.
